title: AUKUS Maritime Innovation Challenge 2025
body: "  Competition key information     Key Information Competition Details     Stage 1 Submission deadline Midday/12:00 on 28 April 2025 (Local Time)͏   Stage 1 Decision release date 26-27 May 2025   Stage 2 Submission portals open (by invitation only) 9 June 2025   Stage 2 Submission Deadline 21 July 2025 (Local Time)   Stage 2 Decision release date 18 August 2025   Total funding available Up to $8 million (US). Together, UK, AUS and US are expecting to fund 3-10 proposals    Technology Readiness Level (TRL) Achieving minimum TRL6 (Technology model or prototype demonstration in a relevant environment)   Contract start month Aim to start November 2025   Project duration 12 months. Final deliverable is to be a demonstration of your technology at an appropriate multinational maritime exercise     Where do I submit my proposal?  Via the DASA Online Submission Service where you will need to register for an account. Only proposals submitted through one of the AUKUS partner portals will be accepted. "
